expectations.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-63: comment with Source Material, Detected Niche, Preserved Elements, and Improvements Made sections

expectations.text: Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
The exact headline 'Ship faster. Break nothing.' appears in the output

Line 242: 'Ship faster.
Break nothing.' — exact text,
is formatting only

expectations.text: Both 'Start Free Trial' and 'See Demo' CTAs are present
expectations.evidence: Lines 255 and 267 in hero section; also repeated in pricing section

expectations.text: Mobile hamburger menu is implemented (look for hamburger/menu icon and toggle logic in JS)
expectations.evidence: button#menu-btn with SVG hamburger; JS toggles hidden class, swaps icons, updates aria-expanded

expectations.text: Page includes more than just the hero — has at least one additional section (features, testimonials, pricing, or footer)

expectations.text: Page has at least title, meta description, and og:title tags
File contains at least 10 lines of vanilla JavaScript for interactivity
